scenario.scene: Modern minimalist patio at golden hour, a low concrete planter with small ornamental grasses behind her, a folded teak deck chair to her right with a cream linen throw draped over it. Distant city skyline softly out of focus in the deep background. Warm low-angle sunlight.
scenario.outfit: Black square-neck cropped tank top, matching black mid-thigh tailored shorts, low-heeled brown leather sandals, a thin gold tennis bracelet, small gold huggie hoops. Hair down in soft beach waves. Subtle bronzy makeup with a soft glow.
scenario.pose: Standing on the patio facing the camera at a slight three-quarter angle, weight on her right leg, looking directly at the camera with a relaxed confident smile.
scenario.grip_or_placement: Right hand at chest level, thumb on the front face of the box, index and middle fingers on the back, ring and pinky tucked under, box angled slightly toward the camera so the front face catches the warm golden- hour light directly.
scenario.lighting: Strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, golden rim light across her right shoulder and right side of the box, deep amber tones across the patio, soft cool sky in the background.
scenario.palette: black tailored, warm gold, teak wood, deep amber, soft sky cool
resolves_failure_modes: strong directional warm light Step 2 matching
scenario.notes: Strong directional light is the cleanest test of Step 2 lighting hooks — golden rim is unmistakable.

step_1_output.step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a black square-neck cropped tank top, matching black mid-thigh tailored shorts, low-heeled brown leather sandals, a thin gold tennis bracelet, small gold huggie hoops, hair down in soft beach waves, subtle bronzy makeup with a soft glow. She stands on a modern minimalist patio at golden hour, a low concrete planter with small ornamental grasses behind her, a folded teak deck chair to her right with a cream linen throw draped over it, distant city skyline softly out of focus in the deep background. Standing facing the camera at a slight three-quarter angle, weight on her right leg, looking directly at the camera with a relaxed confident smile. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame. Her right hand rests at her side, her left hand rests at her side. Strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, golden rim light across her right shoulder, deep amber tones across the patio, soft cool sky in the background. Shot on iPhone 15 Pro 35mm equivalent. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Golden-hour glow confident calm mood, palette of black tailored, warm gold, deep amber. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: Right hand at chest level, thumb on the front face of the box, index and middle fingers on the back, ring and pinky tucked under, box angled slightly toward the camera so the front face catches the warm golden-hour light directly.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will adjust her right arm and hand to physically lift the Alluvi box to chest level with the described grip — the box angled slightly toward the camera so the golden rim light catches its right edge, matching the rim light already on her right shoulder.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — medium full mid-thigh-up framing where face is mid-importance and golden-hour directional light flatters the persona's features without requiring close-up amplification.

step_2_output.step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and styling, body proportions, black square-neck cropped tank and tailored shorts outfit with gold jewelry, and the entire modern minimalist patio scene including the concrete planter, teak deck chair with cream linen throw, and distant city skyline — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. She is now holding the Alluvi product in her right hand at chest level: her right arm bent naturally at the elbow, wrist relaxed, fingers curved around the box with thumb on the front face, index and middle fingers on the back, ring and pinky tucked under the bottom edge, the box angled slightly toward the camera so its front face catches the directional golden-hour light. The product is approximately 7 inches wide, sized realistically relative to her hand. Her body posture and right arm angle may shift slightly to make the holding pose look natural and not stamped on. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — her right hand visibly grips the product, her left hand rests naturally at her side. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; the scene's amber light should illuminate the white surface as light, not tint the white amber. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: strong warm golden-hour sunlight from a low angle on her right side, with golden rim light catching her right shoulder and the right edge of the box, and a long soft shadow falling toward her lower-left.
